entity.summary: Altcoin-focused centralized cryptocurrency exchange that announced an orderly shutdown on 2019-10-01. The operator said the closure was a business decision rather than a security incident because the cost of maintaining security and support exceeded exchange earnings. Trading and deposits ended on 2019-10-15, while the site and withdrawals remained available until 2019-12-01.
entity.notes: The record uses the operator's staged closure calendar as reproduced by multiple contemporaneous publications. No reliable exact launch date or jurisdiction was established during this pass.

events.title: CoinExchange.io announced that it would close
events.description: CoinExchange.io announced that it would shut down because operating the exchange was no longer economically viable. The statement explicitly said the decision was not caused by a security breach or other incident.
events.notes: The operator's statement and closure rationale were reproduced by several contemporaneous publications.

events.title: CoinExchange.io ended trading and deposits
events.description: The published wind-down schedule suspended all trading and deposits on 2019-10-15 while leaving withdrawals available for an additional period.
events.notes: This date marks the end of market services rather than the final website shutdown.

events.title: CoinExchange.io reached its final shutdown date
events.description: CoinExchange.io stated that its website and withdrawal function would remain operational until 2019-12-01, which is used as the terminal operational date for the exchange.
events.notes: Used as the death_date because it was the stated final date for the site and withdrawals.

evidence.title: Crypto exchange CoinExchange.io is closing down
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report reproducing the operator's announcement, rationale, and complete wind-down schedule.

evidence.title: CoinExchange closes citing financial reasons
evidence.notes: Quotes the exchange statement that security and support costs exceeded earnings.

evidence.title: CoinExchange.io closure announced after operating costs exceed revenue
evidence.notes: Preserves the exchange's public closure message and distinguishes the shutdown from a security incident.

evidence.title: CoinExchange.io trading and deposits scheduled to stop on October 15
evidence.notes: States that trading and deposits would be suspended starting 2019-10-15.

evidence.title: CoinExchange to end trading and deposits before full closure
evidence.notes: Independent contemporaneous confirmation of the 2019-10-15 trading and deposit cutoff.

evidence.title: CoinExchange.io website and withdrawals to remain until December 1
evidence.notes: States that the website and withdrawals would remain operational until 2019-12-01.

evidence.title: CoinExchange final closure scheduled for December 1
evidence.notes: Independent confirmation that the exchange would close completely on 2019-12-01.

evidence.title: CoinExchange market listing with closure notice
evidence.notes: Exchange listing preserves the closure notice and the 2019-10-15 suspension date; used as supplementary evidence for the terminal record.
